svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="执行层 vs 值钱能力" id="exec-vs-value"> <mxGraphModel dx="-464" dy="-152" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="880" pageHeight="500" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="AI 给不了的能力:执行层之上,全是岁月和实战喂出来的" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="440" width="820" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VAL" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=4;" value="AI 给不了的能力" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="230" width="680" x="100" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="V1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="架构能力
高可用 / 可扩展 / 可维护" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="130" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="V2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="前瞻性
预判半年后的坑" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="350" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="V3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="产品能力
做对的事,不只把事做对" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="550" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="V4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="创新
AI 想不到的非常规解" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="230" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="V5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="指导 AI 正确地开发
让它做对,不让它乱来" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="450" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EXEC" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#64748b;spacingTop=4;" value="执行层 · AI 接管(写代码 / 调 API / 补样板,价值归零区)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="680" x="100" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
